name: Pasta with Black Beans and Spinach
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces black beans, canned, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for the pasta.
2. Cook the pasta until done, then drain.
3. Meanwhile, heat the pasta sauce in a large saucepan over medium heat.
4. Defrost the spinach by microwaving on high for 3 to 4 minutes (or leave in the refrigerator to defrost).
5. Drain most of the liquid from the spinach and add it to the sauce.
6. Rinse and drain the black beans, then add them to the sauce.
7. Once the pasta is cooked and drained, add it to the sauce and mix well.
8. Serve with Parmesan cheese. Leftovers taste just as good.
This recipe is ideal for when you get home late and need a quick dinner.
